HOW IT WORKS
Ready to start your
health journey?
Simplify your health journey with one app that does it all.
Tell us about yourself

Share what matters to you. Your health goals, lifestyle and preferences.

Connect your world

Decide what you want to connect: your favorites apps, trackers, calendars and more.

Start taking actions!

Lemon understands you and will have the best actions for you - at the right time - to achieve your goals.

FAQ's

You've got question, we've got answers.

General
Set up
Data Privacy & Security
Support
What is Lemon?

Lemon is your personalized health companion that helps you take meaningful actions toward better well-being so you can live healthier, longer. It brings together your health data, daily habits, preferences, and goals to create a simple, guided plan with actionable steps toward better health.

How does Lemon work?

Lemon connects with your favorite health apps and wearable devices to understand your habits, routines, and goals. Using this information, it provides personalized insights and actionable recommendations that fit into your lifestyle — helping you make small, consistent changes that lead to lasting results.

What makes Lemon different from others?

Most health apps give you metrics and insights. Lemon helps you actually do what matters most. It brings together your real-time data including your location, your health data, your preferences, and even your calendar if you choose to, and turns it into one-tap actions so you can take better care of your health without overthinking it. Lemon learns from your activity and feedback, and continuously adapts, making it the ultimate companion for your health journey.

Who is Lemon for?

Lemon is for anyone who wants to live healthier and longer — whether you're starting your wellness journey, balancing a busy schedule, or fine-tuning your fitness. If you use multiple apps or wearables and want a simple way to connect it all, Lemon is built for you.

Can Lemon help with prescriptions, medications, and other treatment questions?

Lemon is designed for general health and wellness support — not medical treatment or diagnosis. While it can help you stay on top of healthy routines and reminders, it does not replace medical advice. For prescriptions or treatment-specific questions, always consult your healthcare provider.

Join the
Lemon Journey
Finally take action to live healthier, longer.

research_proof_points.text: With an annual growth rate of 19.50%, vertical SaaS outpaces the broader market.
research_proof_points.relevance_reason: The growth rate indicates a rising demand for industry-specific software, which can help address the pain points of difficulty taking action toward better health and being overwhelmed by multiple health apps and wearables.
research_proof_points.source_content_snippet:
With an annual growth rate of 19.50%, vertical SaaS outpaces the broader market. This reflects increasing demand for industry-specific software that embeds domain workflows, regulatory requirements, and tailored analytics.

Embedded analytics counts 540+ companies, supported by a workforce of around 31 600 employees. The segment sees incremental growth aligned with integration-focused development.

research_proof_points.text: Some AI-native software companies reach approximately $3M in annual recurring revenue within their first year and scale to roughly $100M by year four, exceeding typical early-stage SaaS growth timelines.
research_proof_points.relevance_reason: The statistic highlights the potential for AI-native software companies, including those in the vertical SaaS category, to achieve significant revenue growth.

content_brief.benchmark_reference: Industry benchmarks for vertical SaaS companies on LinkedIn
content_brief.reasoning: With 3 distinct pain points and 3 features, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities. The minimal brand tone supports a straightforward, educational approach. The presence of 2 proof points and a strong stat also make a carousel a good fit. Given the feature count, pain point count, and proof point count, a carousel can effectively communicate the value proposition of Lemon. The brand tone being minimal and the presence of a strong stat further support this choice.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: You spend hours tracking your health data across multiple apps and wearables, but struggle to make sense of it all and take meaningful action
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Lemon is a personalized health companion
strategy_brief.proof_point: Lemon connects with your favorite health apps and wearable devices
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Open with a health enthusiast checking multiple apps and wearables every morning, and name the frustration of not being able to take action toward better health

visual.image_prompt: Create an asymmetric composition with a calm, minimal environment, reserving roughly 60% of the frame on the left as a clean, low-detail zone with a soft white or light gray tone, suitable for overlaid text. The right side features a subtle glow with accents of #ffdc42, hinting at warmth and wellness, and incorporating abstract shapes or gentle gradients that evoke a sense of harmony and balance. A muted, darker tone, such as #000000, can be used sparingly to add depth or contrast without overwhelming the scene. The overall mood should be serene, with an emphasis on empty space and simplicity, reflecting the 'minimal-saas' aesthetic and the idea of clarity in health and wellness.

raw_copy:
You start every morning by checking your fitness tracker, health app, and wearable device, but the more data you collect, the more overwhelmed you feel. 
You spend hours tracking your health data across multiple apps and wearables, but struggle to make sense of it all and take meaningful action. 
This daily routine is frustrated by the fact that you cannot seem to find a way to turn all this data into actionable steps towards better health.

As you try to piece together the information from various sources, you realize that the time spent on this task could be better utilized. 
The constant switching between apps and devices is not only time-consuming but also leads to frustration and burnout. 
eMarketer found that nearly two-thirds of consumers have used a health, fitness, or wearable app on their smartphone or wearable device, which highlights the complexity of the issue. 
This statistic suggests that you are not alone in your struggle to manage health data, and the problem is widespread.

The inability to take meaningful action towards better health is a significant concern, as it can lead to a range of negative outcomes. 
Without a clear understanding of your health data, you may struggle to identify areas for improvement, set realistic goals, or track progress over time. 
This can result in a sense of disempowerment and frustration, making it even more challenging to maintain a healthy lifestyle. 
Furthermore, the lack of actionable insights can lead to poor decision-making, which can have long-term consequences for your overall well-being.

In an ideal world, you would have a personalized health companion that could help you make sense of your data and provide actionable recommendations. 
This companion would connect with your favorite health apps and wearable devices, allowing you to access all your data in one place. 
It would also provide personalized insights and guidance, enabling you to take meaningful action towards better health. 
This is where Lemon comes in – a personalized health companion designed to simplify your health journey.

Lemon connects with your favorite health apps and wearable devices, allowing you to access all your data in one place. 
This streamlined approach saves you time and reduces the frustration associated with switching between multiple apps and devices. 
With Lemon, you can easily track your progress, identify areas for improvement, and receive personalized recommendations for achieving your health goals.

The benefits of using Lemon are numerous, from saving time to reducing stress and increasing motivation. 
By providing a comprehensive view of your health data, Lemon enables you to make informed decisions and take control of your well-being. 
Whether you are looking to improve your physical health, mental well-being, or overall quality of life, Lemon is the perfect companion to help you achieve your goals.

In addition to its core features, Lemon is designed to be user-friendly and accessible. 
The platform is easy to navigate, and the insights provided are clear and actionable. 
This means that you can focus on what matters most – taking care of your health and well-being – without getting bogged down in complex data or technical jargon.

If you are tired of feeling overwhelmed by your health data and are looking for a personalized health companion to help you take control, sign up for Lemon today. 
With its streamlined approach, personalized insights, and user-friendly design, Lemon is the perfect solution for anyone looking to simplify their health journey and achieve their wellness goals. 
By joining the Lemon community, you will be taking the first step towards a healthier, happier you – so why wait, sign up now and start your journey towards better health.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is well-structured and easy to follow, with each sentence building on the previous one to create a clear narrative about the problem and the solution. The hook effectively identifies a specific daily friction that the target audience can relate to, and the copy maintains a consistent tone and pace to keep the reader engaged. The copy adheres to the writing instruction, using simple and direct language, avoiding superlatives and technical jargon, and presenting one idea per sentence. The copy accurately reflects the primary claim and proof point, stating that Lemon connects with favorite health apps and wearable devices, without introducing any fabricated statistics or claims.
